#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Create a mobile-first application for airline boarding and deboarding logistics optimization with passenger, staff, and admin user types. Features include real-time notifications, intelligent boarding system, 2D aircraft visualization, QR scanning, and analytics."

backend:
  - task: "Demo authentication API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Demo login creates user and returns session token. Tested with curl and working."

  - task: "Emergent Google OAuth integration"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Session exchange endpoint implemented following Emergent Auth playbook."

  - task: "Passenger booking API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Returns passenger booking with flight details and all passengers list."

  - task: "Staff flight management API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Staff can get current flight, update status, update boarding phase."

  - task: "Staff notification APIs"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "notify-group and notify-zone endpoints update passenger statuses."

  - task: "Boarding confirmation API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "confirm-boarding endpoint marks passenger as seated."

  - task: "Admin dashboard API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Returns flight stats and recent flights."

  - task: "Admin flights CRUD API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Create and list flights endpoints working."

  - task: "Admin analytics API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Returns analytics data including efficiency metrics."

frontend:
  - task: "Landing page with role selection"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/index.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Landing page with Google OAuth button and demo mode role cards. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "Passenger dashboard"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(passenger)/index.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Shows flight info, status badges, boarding progress. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "Boarding pass with QR code"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(passenger)/boarding-pass.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Beautiful boarding pass with QR code. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "Staff dashboard with real-time stats"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(staff)/index.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Shows passenger stats, AI recommendations, progress bar. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "Boarding control panel"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(staff)/control.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Flight status controls, boarding phase, priority group notifications. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "Aircraft visualization"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(staff)/aircraft.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "2D/3D seat map with color-coded seats. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "QR Scanner"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(staff)/scanner.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Camera-based QR scanner for boarding pass verification."

  - task: "Admin dashboard"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(admin)/index.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Stats cards, quick actions, recent flights. Verified via screenshot."

  - task: "Admin analytics"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(admin)/analytics.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Weekly chart, performance metrics, AI insights. Verified via screenshot."

metadata:
  created_by: "main_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus:
    - "Demo authentication API"
    - "Passenger booking API"
    - "Staff flight management API"
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: false
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "main"
    message: "MVP implemented with all core features. Backend APIs and frontend screens working. Need to test backend APIs with curl commands to verify all endpoints."
